text: t was narratod from Muhammad bin /Al that he heard YA bin Abi Talb (= B o2) say: The Messenger of Alah (&) said: “I have been given that which was not given to any of the other Prophet ()." We said: O Messenger of Allah (&), wht i if? He saic: *| have been supported (against the enemy) with fear | have been given the keys of the Earth, | have been named Ahmad, the dust has been made a means of purifoation for me and my ummah has been PR ‘Grade: Hasan (Darussalam)] (Darussalam) P —
